Name: First Task!
objective: Check the order symbol and follow Arthur's instructions.
Reward: 4 Turnip Seeds +  and a festival of your choosing.
Additional Info: Completed by default in AP

Name: How to place furniture!
objective: Move the storage box provided into your room.
Additional Info: Completed by default in AP

Name: Make Lumber
objective: Break a piece of wood with your axe.
Reward: A Cheep Axe and a Lumber/Stone Box
Additional Info: Accepting request gives a Cheap Axe

Name: Give an item!
objective: Give a Turnip to Clorica

Name: Purchase Rice!
objective: Buy rice from the General Store.

Name: Make Material Stone!
objective: Break apart a stone with your hammer.
Additional Info: Accepting request gives a Cheap Hammer

Name: Try Fishing!
objective: Catch a fish and give it to Vishnal.
Additional Info: Accepting request gives a Cheap Rod

Name: Use a Fertilizer Bin!
objective: Put a grass item into your fertilizer bin.

Name: Mine Iron!
objective: Mine a piece of Iron from a mineral.

Name: Raise friendship levels! (1)
objective: Raise the FP or LP of everyone in town to 1.
Additional Info: does not include Raven +  Barrett +  and people not yet unlocked.

Name: Look at illustrations!
objective: Check the illustrations in your trophy room.

Name: Check difficulty level!
objective: Check the trophy for adjusting your difficulty level.

Name: Get an Airship License!
objective: Check the order symbol and take the test to order your airship license.
Reward: The exchange coin feature will become available at Arthur's store.

Name: Get a Cooking Table!
objective: Speak to Porcoline about getting a Cooking Table.

Name: Start Cooking!
objective: Prepare a dish.

Name: Get a Forge!
objective: Get a forging license and purchase a forge from Bado.

Name: Forge a weapon!
objective: Forge a weapon.

Name: Make a farming tool!
objective: Use the forge to make a farming tool.

Name: Get a Crafting Table!
objective: Get a crafting license and speak to Bado to purchase a Crafting Table.

Name: Make some armor!
objective: Use the Crafting Table to make armor.

Name: Get a Chemistry Set!
objective: Get a chemistry license and speak to Jones or Nancy to purchase a Chemistry Set.

Name: Make some medicine!
objective: Use the chemistry set to make medicine.

Name: Raise a skill level!
objective: Raise at least one skill to level 20.

Name: Raise a weapon skill level!
objective: Raise at least one weapon skill to level 15.

Name: Upgrade a weapon!
Unlock requirement: Complete Raise a weapon skill level!
objective: Use the forge to upgrade a weapon.

Name: Raise a magic skill level!
objective: Raise at least one magic skill to level 15.

Name: Upgrade your armor!
Unlock requirement: Complete Raise a magic skill level!
objective: Use the crafting table to upgrade your armor.

Name: Use a nutrient!
objective: Spread nutrient medicine over your field.

Name: Raise shipment rates!
objective: Ship at least 10% of the different items in the game.
Reward: A backpack upgrade order will be made available.

Name: Get a Shop License!
objective: Use the order symbol to get a shop license.

Name: Prepare for a typhoon!
objective: Spread Wettable Powder over your field.

Name: Befriend 5 monsters!
objective: Tame at least 5 monsters.
Additional Info: Note = You will need to either expand your barn or build a second barn in order to complete this request.

Name: Upgrade a Staff!
objective: Use the forge to upgrade a staff.

Name: Raise friendship levels! (5)
Unlock requirement: Complete Upgrade a staff! and Harvest 6 veggies!
objective: Raise everyone's FP/LP to 5.
Additional Info: Note = This does not include Raven or Barrett.

Name: Ship a level 10 flower!
objective: Raise a crop to level 10 and place it in the shipment box.

Name: Raise total shipment fee!
objective: Earn at least one million G.
Additional Info: Note = This refers to all money earned since the start of the game. You do not need 1mil G on your person.

Name: Harvest a large gold crop!
objective: Grow and harvest a large gold crop.
Reward: Ultimate Curry and Royal Curry recipes.

Name: Harvest all crops!
objective: Harvest at least one of every crop in the game.
Additional Info: Note = This does not include the large versions of every crop.

Name: Ship a gold level 10 crop!
Unlock requirement: Complete Harvest a large gold Crop!
objective: Grow and harvest a level 10 gold crop.

Name: Raise a skill level to 50!
Unlock requirement: Complete: Raise friendship levels! (5) +  Harvest all crops! +  Ship a gold level 10 crop!
objective: Raise at least one skill level to 50.

Name: Befriend 50 monsters!
Unlock requirement: Complete Raise friendship levels! (5) +  Harvest all crops! +  Ship a gold level 10 crop!
objective: Tame at least 50 monsters.
Additional Info: Note = You must have all 50 monsters tamed and living in your barns at the same time. Releasing any will lower the counter.

Name: Raise friendship levels! (10)
Unlock requirement: Complete: Raise friendship levels! (5) +  Harvest all crops! +  Ship a gold level 10 crop!
objective: Get everyone in town to 10 FP or LP.
Additional Info: Note = This does not include Raven or Barrett.

Name: Get a 50% shipment rate!
objective: Ship at least half of the different items in the game.

Name: Raise a skill level to 80!
objective: Raise at least on skill to level 80.
Reward: Heart Drink recipe +  Intelligencer recipe +  Protein recipe +  and Vital Gummi recipe

Name: Complete the Sharance Maze!
objective: Clear the Sharance Maze.

Name: Give Dolce a Moondrop!
Unlock requirement: Have Dolce in town and complete Give Amber Toyherb!
objective: Give a Moondrop to Dolce.

Name: Build a Monster Barn!
Unlock requirement: Have the ability to order monster barn construction.
objective: Go to the order symbol and have a monster barn built.

Name: Befriend monsters!
objective: Tame at least one monster.
Additional Info: Note = You will be given a Fodder Box to complete this request.

Name: Ride on a monster friend!
objective: Take a rideable monster out and get on top of it.

Name: Befriend an item monster!
objective: Tame a monster that will drop produce an item each day.
Additional Info: Note = Monsters available early on that meet this criteria include Wooly and Buffamoo.

Name: Give a monster a task!
objective: Tame a monster that does not produce items +  and speak to it in your barn to assign field work.

Name: Befriend a boss monster!
objective: Tame a boss monster.
Additional Info: Note = Unlike normal monsters +  bosses can only be tamed using specific items.

Name: From Eliza!
objective: Speak to Eliza.
Additional Info: Note = Upon completing this request +  any item stored in the storage bin will be inside at the start of a new game.}}

Name: Make a shipment!
objective: Ship an item
Reward: Potato and Spinach Seeds available at the General Store.

Name: Harvest Potato!
objective: Grow and harvest a Potato.
Reward: Radish Seeds available at the General Store.

Name: Harvest 20 Turnip!
objective: Harvest 20 or more Turnip.
Reward: Pink Turnip Seeds available at the General Store.

Name: Harvest 5 Radishes!
objective: Harvest at least 5 Radishes.
Reward: Yam Seeds available at the General Store.

Name: Ship a level 2 Turnip!
objective: Plant level 2 or higher Turnip Seed or level up a growing Turnip and place it in your shipping bin.
Reward: The General Store and Carnation Flower Store will start selling higher level seeds as you level up their respective crops.
Additional Info: Note = You can use the sickle to get higher level seeds from a crop +  or sprinkle greenifier on a crop that is still growing to level it up.

Name: Harvest 6 veggies!
Unlock requirement: Complete Harvest 20 Turnip! Harvest 5 Radishes! and Ship a level 2 Turnip!
Item Requirements: Turnip Seeds + Potato Seeds + Spinach Seeds + Radish Seeds + Yam Seeds + Pink Turnip Seeds
objective: Grow and harvest at least 6 different types of vegetables.
Reward: Carrot +  Corn +  and Strawberry Seeds available at the General Store.

Name: Ship a level 5 veggie!
objective: Plant level 5 or higher seed or level up a growing crop and place it in your shipping bin.
Reward: Pumpkin and Cucumber Seeds available at the General Store.
Additional Info: The silver and license are to enable scything a seed to level 5. This can be done with greenifier and time as well +  but is more expensive and time consuming +  so I'm setting this for logic purposes

Name: Till Corn
objective: Use your hoe on a piece of corn on your field.
Reward: Green Pepper Seeds available at the General.

Name: Give Dylas a Carrot!
Unlock requirement: Have Dylas in town and complete Ship a level 5 veggie!
objective: Give a Carrot to Dylas.
Reward: Leek Seeds available at the General Store.
Additional Info: Note = Dylas is such a horse.

Name: Harvest 12 veggies!
Item Requirements: Turnip Seeds + Potato Seeds + Spinach Seeds + Radish Seeds + Yam Seeds + Pink Turnip Seeds + Carrot Seeds + Corn Seeds + Strawberry Seeds + Pumpkin Seeds + Cucumber Seeds + Green Pepper Seeds + Leek Seeds
objective: Grow and harvest at least 12 different types of vegetables.
Reward: Bok Choy +  Cabbage +  and Onion Seeds available at the General Store.

Name: Ship a level 10 veggie!
objective: Plant level 10 or seed or level up a growing crop and place it in your shipping bin.
Reward: Eggplant and Hot-Hot Fruit Seeds available at the General Store

Name: Harvest certain veggies!
objective: Harvest 20 Bok Choy +  Cabbage +  and Onion (each).
Reward: Tomato and Gold Melon Seeds available at the General Store.

Name: Cut down a Shining Tree!
objective: Grow and chop down a Shining Tree.
Reward: Shining Seeds available at the General Store.
Additional Info: Note = Tree seeds can be found near the Obsidian Mansion prior to taking this request.

Name: Harvest 20 Oranges!
Item Requirements: Bok Choy Seeds + Orange Tree Seeds
objective: Grow and orange tree and harvest at least 20 Oranges.
Reward: Orange Tree Seeds available at the General Store.
Additional Info: Note = Tree seeds can be found near the Obsidian Mansion prior to taking this request. Trees produce multiple fruit each day +  so you only need to grow one.

Name: Harvest a large veggie!
objective: grow and harvest a large vegetable.
Reward: Pineapple Seeds available in the general store.
Additional Info: Note = To grow large crops +  plant 4 of the crop in a 2X2 plot and sprinkle them with giantizer +  then wait for them to merge into one.

Name: Harvest 50 Grapes!
Unlock requirement: Complete Cut down a Shining Tree!
objective: Grow a grape tree and harvest at least 50 Grapes.
Reward: Grape Tree Seeds available at the General Store.
Additional Info: Note = Tree seeds can be found near the Obsidian Mansion prior to taking this request. Trees produce multiple fruit each day +  so you only need to grow one.

Name: Harvest 50 Apples!
Unlock requirement: Complete Cut down a Shining Tree!
objective: Grow a apple tree and harvest at least 50 Apples.
Reward: Apple Tree Seeds available at the General Store.
Additional Info: Note = Tree seeds can be found near the Obsidian Mansion prior to taking this request. Trees produce multiple fruit each day +  so you only need to grow one.

Name: Harvest non-golden veggies!
Item Requirements: Turnip Seeds + Potato Seeds + Spinach Seeds + Radish Seeds + Yam Seeds + Pink Turnip Seeds + Carrot Seeds + Corn Seeds + Strawberry Seeds + Pumpkin Seeds + Cucumber Seeds + Green Pepper Seeds + Leek Seeds + Bok Choy Seeds + Cabbage Seeds + Onion Seeds + Eggplant Seeds + Hot-Hot Seeds + Tomato Seeds + Gold Melon Seeds
objective: Harvest at least one of all vegetables except for gold crops.
Reward: Gold Potato Seeds available at the General Store.
Additional Info: Note = This does not include large crops.

Name: Gift for Margaret!
objective: Give Margaret a glass of Pineapple Juice.
Reward: Gold Pumpkin Seeds available at the General Store.

Name: Get a 25% shipment rate!
objective: Ship at least 1/4 of all the different types of items in the game.
Reward: Gold Cabbage Seeds available at the General Store.

Name: Give a Turnip Heaven!
objective: Give a Turnip Heaven to Arthur.
Reward: Gold Turnip Seeds available at the General Store.
Additional Info: Note = You will be provided with Gold Turnip Seeds to complete this request.

Name: Harvest a Sword Flower!
Unlock requirement: Have Dolce in town and complete Harvest 6 veggies!
objective: Grow and harvest a Sword Flower.
Reward: Sword Seeds available at the General Store.
Additional Info: Note = Prior to taking this request +  Sword Seeds can be found in field dungeons.

Name: Harvest a Shield Flower!
Unlock requirement: Have Dolce in town and complete Harvest 6 veggies!
objective: Grow and harvest a Shield Flower.
Reward: Shield Seeds available at the General Store.
Additional Info: Note = Prior to taking this request +  Shield Seeds can be found in field dungeons.

Name: Complete a field dungeon!
Unlock requirement: Have Leon in town +  complete Harvest 6 veggies! and raise level at least to 70.
objective: Grow and dungeon flower and defeat the boss within.
Reward: Dungeon Seeds available at the General Store.
Additional Info: Note = Prior to taking this request +  Dungeon Seeds can be found in Sercerezo Hill.

Name: Harvest Toyherb!
objective: Grow and harvest a Toyherb.
Reward: Pink Cat and Moondrop seeds available at the Carnation Flower Store.

Name: Harvest 3 flowers!
objective: Grow and harvest 3 different types of flowers.
Reward: Charm Blue seeds available at the Carnation Flower Store.

Name: Give Amber a Toyherb!
Unlock requirement: Have Amber in town and complete Harvest 3 flowers!
objective: Give a Toyherb to Amber.
Reward: Pom-Pom Grass Seeds available at the Carnation Flower Store.

Name: Harvest 9 Charm Blues!
objective: Grow and Harvest at least 9 Charm Blues.
Reward: Cherry Grass Seeds available at the Carnation Flower Store.

Name: Harvest Cherry Grass!
objective: Grow and harvest Cherry Grass.
Reward: Lamp Grass Seeds available at the Carnation Flower Store.

Name: Harvest 5 flowers!
objective: Harvest at least 5 different types of flowers.
Reward: Clover Seeds available at the Carnation Flower Store.

Name: Till a 4-Leaf Clover!
objective: Use the hoe on a 4-Leaf Clover.
Reward: Ironleaf Seeds for sale at the Carnation Flower Store.

Name: Fight using an Ironleaf!
objective: Throw an Ironleaf at a monster.
Reward: Autumn Grass Seeds available at the Carnation Flower Store.

Name: Harvest a large flower!
objective: Grow and harvest a large flower.
Reward: Fireflower Seeds available at the Carnation Flower Store.

Name: Harvest Autumn Grass!
objective: RF4Autumn Grass Grow and harvest Autumn Grass.
Reward: Noel Grass Seeds available at the Carnation Flower Store.

Name: Harvest Blue Crystal!
objective: Grow and harvest a Blue Crystal.
Reward: Blue Crystal Seeds available at the Carnation Flower Store.
Additional Info: Note = Blue Crystal Seeds can be found prior to taking this request in Sercezero Hill during spring.

Name: Harvest Green Crystal!
objective: Grow and harvest a Green Crystal.
Reward: Green Crystal Seeds available at the Carnation Flower Store.
Additional Info: Note = Green Crystal Seeds can be found prior to taking this request in Sercezero Hill during summer.

Name: Harvest Red Crystal!
objective: Grow and harvest a Red Crystal.
Reward: Red Crystal Seeds available at the Carnation Flower Store.
Additional Info: Note = Red Crystal Seeds can be found prior to taking this request in Sercezero Hill during fall.

Name: Harvest White Crystal!
objective: Grow and harvest a White Crystal.
Reward: White Crystal Seeds available at the Carnation Flower Store.
Additional Info: Note = White Crystal Seeds can be found prior to taking this request in Sercezero Hill during winter.

Name: Harvest almost all crops!
Item Requirements: Gold Turnip Seeds + White Crystal Seeds
objective: Grow and harvest at least one of everything except for Emery Flowers.
Reward: Emery Flower Seeds available at the Carnation Flower Store.
Additional Info: Note = This does not include the large versions of every crop.
